functional_requirements: Handle product inquiries and provide product information
Check and retrieve order status information
Support multiple languages for user interactions
Escalate complex issues to human agents based on defined criteria
Maintain conversation context throughout user interactions
Provide seamless handoff mechanism to human agents

security: Secure storage and transmission of customer data
Authentication and authorization for order status access
Secure API integrations with backend systems
Protection against injection attacks and bot abuse
performance: Response time under 3 seconds for standard queries
scalability: Scale during peak customer service hours
Support addition of new languages without system redesign
Accommodate growing product catalog and knowledge base

complexity_assessment.estimated_effort: 6-9 months with a team of 5-7 (1 PM, 2 developers, 1 ML engineer, 1 QA, 1 DevOps, 1 UX designer)

user_stories.story: As a customer, I want to ask questions about products so that I can make informed purchasing decisions
As a customer, I want to check my order status so that I can track my delivery
As a customer, I want to receive troubleshooting help so that I can resolve basic issues independently
As a non-English speaking customer, I want to interact with the chatbot in my preferred language so that I can communicate effectively
As a customer with a complex issue, I want to be escalated to a human agent so that I can receive specialized assistance
As a customer service agent, I want to receive escalated conversations with full context so that I can assist customers efficiently
As a system administrator, I want to monitor chatbot performance and conversations so that I can ensure quality service

acceptance_criteria: Chatbot accurately answers at least 80% of product inquiries without escalation
Order status is retrieved and displayed within 3 seconds
Troubleshooting guides resolve at least 60% of basic issues
System supports minimum of 5 languages at launch
Complex issues are identified and escalated within 2 conversation turns
System maintains 99.9% uptime over a 30-day period
Handoff to human agents includes complete conversation history
Response time remains under 3 seconds for 95% of queries
System can handle at least 100 concurrent conversations

clarification_needed: Which specific languages should be supported initially?
What defines a 'complex issue' requiring escalation?
What is the expected volume of concurrent users?
Which order management system will the chatbot integrate with?
What product catalog system is currently in use?
Are there existing knowledge bases or FAQs to import?
What channels should the chatbot support (web, mobile app, messaging platforms)?
What is the expected response accuracy threshold?
Are there specific compliance requirements based on operating regions?
What authentication method will be used for order status verification?
What is the escalation workflow and agent availability model?
What analytics and reporting capabilities are required?
Is voice interaction required or text-only?
What is the budget allocation for this project?

consistency_issues: No specification of supported communication channels (web, mobile, SMS, etc.)
Missing details on authentication mechanism for order verification
Unclear escalation criteria and workflow process
No definition of troubleshooting scope and limitations
Missing integration requirements with existing systems
No specification of data retention policies
Missing fallback behavior when translation services are unavailable
No specification of conversation logging and audit requirements
